merged_prs.title: [15.0.X] Miscellaneous updates for modules targeting CDC reconstruction at HLT

[HLTrigger/Egamma] fix swapped eta parameter for photons in Diphoton XGBoost MVA filter (15_0_X)

Fix Service type name displayed in error message [15.0.x]
Remove legacy CUDA modules for HCAL unpacking and local reconstruction [15.0.x]
fix a bug in miniAOD_tools.py backport to CMSSW_15_0_X
Include L1Calo ZS modifications from 15_1_X to 15_0_x

[15_0_X] Update 2025 HMT shower thresholds for pp collision
[15_0_X] Reduce memory usage in NANO merge jobs
